# LawyerSys-v2 Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-20

## Active Technologies

- Flutter 3.x, Dart 3.x (targeting iOS 13+ and Android 8.0+) + flutter_bloc (state management), dio (HTTP client), flutter_secure_storage (token storage), sqflite (offline database), firebase_messaging (push notifications), local_auth (biometric authentication), flutter_localizations (i18n for Arabic/English) (003-flutter-mobile-app)

src/
tests/
